DISCOVERY 610, NO APPEARANCES. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED: DEFENDANT'S MOTION TO COMPEL RESPONSES TO FORM AND SPECIAL INTERROGATORIES AND REQUEST FOR PRODUCTION OF DOCUMENTS IS GRANTED, NO OPPOSITION HAS BEEN FILED. PLAINTIFF IS ORDERED TO SERVE COMPLETE VERIFIED RESPONSES WITHOUT OBJECTION WITHIN 21 DAYS OF NOTICE OF THIS ORDER. FAILURE TO RESPOND WAS A MISUSE OF THE DISCOVERY PROCESS.
